methods.description: Process for preparing and examining fossil specimens preserved in Eocene Baltic amber to study their morphological features.

steps.description: The amber pieces were ground and polished, so that the inclusions and their diagnostic structures could be examined at high magnification and photographed.
steps.searchable_summary: grind and polish amber pieces for examination

steps.description: Some pieces examined were embedded in artificial epoxy resin.
steps.searchable_summary: embed amber pieces in epoxy resin

steps.description: A piece labelled CCHH 1754-13 was further treated to gain visibility of hypopygial area by hand-filling the space between amber layers with an epoxy resin.
steps.searchable_summary: hand-fill amber layers with epoxy resin for visibility

methods.description: Procedure for measuring and analyzing the morphological features of fossil specimens, including body and wing lengths, and calculating various ratios.

steps.description: Specimen dimensions are given in micrometres, except for the total body length (in millimetres, rounded off to the second decimal place).
steps.searchable_summary: measure specimen dimensions in micrometres and millimetres

steps.description: The body and wing lengths were measured from the antennal pedicel to the end of the gonostylus and from the arculus to the tip, respectively.
The lengths of leg segments and palpomeres were rounded to the nearest 5 μm.
steps.searchable_summary: round leg segment and palpomere lengths to nearest 5 μm

steps.description: The antennal, leg and venarum ratios were calculated to the second digit after the decimal point.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate antennal, leg, and venarum ratios

methods.description: Method for photographing fossil specimens using microscopes and compiling images with image stacking software.

steps.description: Photographs were taken using a Leica M205 A and PZO Biolar SK14 microscopes with a Sony NEX-3N digital camera.
steps.searchable_summary: take photographs using microscopes and digital camera

steps.description: The images were compiled using the Helicon Focus 8 image stacking software.
